nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Langley was born on 6 June 1370, in Denton, Lancashire, England as the son of Richard de Langley and Alice de Barton. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Catherine Atherton. He died in 1447, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Langley est né le 6 juin 1370, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Richard de Langley et Alice de Barton. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Catherine Atherton. Il est décédé en 1447, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Langley wurde am 6. Juni 1370 in Denton, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Richard de Langley und Alice de Barton geboren. Er hatte mit Catherine Atherton mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1447 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Langley è nato il il 6 giugno 1370 nel Denton, Lancashire, England come figlio di Richard de Langley e Alice de Barton. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Catherine Atherton. Morì nel 1447, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Langleyは1370年6月6日にイギリスランカシュアイアデントンでRichard de LangleyとAlice de Bartonの息子として生まれた。彼はCatherine Athertonとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1447年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Langley(은)는 1370년 6월 6일 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 Richard de Langley(와)과 Alice de Barton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Catherine Atherton(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Langley nasceu em 6 de junho de 1370, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Richard de Langley e Alice de Barton. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Catherine Atherton. Ele faleceu em 1447, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Langley родился 6 июня 1370 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия. Его родителей звали Richard de Langley и Alice de Barton. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Catherine Atherton. Он умер в 1447 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Langley nació el 6 de junio de 1370, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard de Langley y Alice de Barton. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Catherine Atherton. Murió en 1447, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
